welcome to 36917 — a delta of the Great River (c) 2026.

your battle to win

February 3, 2021

big blue sky, it’s clouding over
empty streets filling the voices begin
shouting intentions to bring you to justice
don’t look at me it’s your battle to win

(chorus)
it’s your life - can’t you hear about the anthem you’re singing
it’s your time - to rewrite the path that you’re on
it’s your chance - to dissolve the disaster you’re bringing
don’t look at me, don’t look at me this time
it’s your battle to win

try and find sanctuary run from the storm
duck through the crossfire like you’ve done before
give ‘em the finger fore you duck out of site
don’t call me for answers it’s your battle to fight

(chorus)

i tried to listen to give what you wanted
whenever i turned around your life was still haunted
call it abandonment i call it sin
to pretend I can help, when it;s your battle to win

(chorus)
